name: Skill submission

## Skill Information

**Skill Name:**

**Repository:** owner/repo

**Path to skill file:**

**Description:**
A brief description of what this skill does and when it should be used.

## Metadata

**Tags:** (comma-separated, e.g., frontend, testing, security)

**Aliases:** (alternative names for the skill)

**Domain(s):** (e.g., web-development, devops, security)

## Quality Checklist

- [ ] Repository has at least 10 stars
- [ ] Repository has been updated in the last 6 months
- [ ] Skill file is well-documented with clear use cases
- [ ] No security concerns (passes security scanner)
- [ ] Skill provides clear value and is not redundant with existing registry entries

## Additional Information

**Why should this skill be in the registry?**

**Link to successful usage example:** (optional)

Please see [CONTRIBUTING-REGISTRY.md](../../CONTRIBUTING-REGISTRY.md) for detailed submission guidelines.
